title: T-022 — API: Routings + routing_operations CRUD
prompt: Implement /api/technical/items/[item_code]/routings (list, create version) and nested /operations (sequence editor) per §12.4 + V-TEC-60..63. Validate: V-TEC-60 (op_no contiguous, no gaps), V-TEC-61 (each op has line_id OR machine_id), V-TEC-62 (run_time_per_unit_sec > 0), V-TEC-63 (manufacturing_operation_name in reference_tables.manufacturing_operations.row_key). Approve workflow mirrors BOM (draft -> approved -> active with prior superseded). Audit log. RED tests/api/routings.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/routings.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Routings CRUD with sequence + resource validation; approve/publish workflow.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use the same supersede pattern as BOMs. Cost preview computation lives separately (T-023). manufacturing_operation_name link to bom_lines field used for cross-checks but no DB FK.
acceptance_criteria: Given operations [1,2,4], when POST runs, then 422 V-TEC-60 (gap).
Given op without line_id and machine_id, when POST, then 422 V-TEC-61.
Given run_time_per_unit_sec=0 for production op, when POST, then 422 V-TEC-62.
Given manufacturing_operation_name not in reference_table, when POST, then 422 V-TEC-63.
test_strategy: RED tests for each V-TEC-60..63 violation.
risk_red_lines: Do not delete routing rows (soft supersede only).
